claim_separation.deterministic_baseline_grounds: all committed-fact recall (exact lookup, the ceiling)
claim_separation.neural_binder_grounds: 2-entity content-addressed binding on substrate hidden states; measured head-to-head vs lookup. Against the PROPER (entity,attribute) lookup (the exact ceiling on committed facts) the binder does NOT win; it only beats a naive entity-only lookup that conflates relations. The binder's value is grounding from representation when no structured table exists, not beating an exact table.
claim_separation.verifier_grounds: all abstain / block / uncertain outcomes (the veto)
claim_separation.constrained_decode: mechanical emission of committed value at the factual slot

claim_status: MEASURED, single environment (D_Cortex substrate as target model, CUDA same machine). Mechanical grounding + unbypassable verifier veto demonstrated on the D_Cortex_PatentAnalyst pack. NOT a multi-model or production claim.
